Game.Name: The Legend of Zelda- Third Quest
Game.Plot: BS The Legend of Zelda was an expanded and remade version of famicom The Legend of Zelda that was released for the Satellaview attachment of the Super Nintendo Entertainment System in Japan.The gameplay was identical to its predecessor, but the maximum of Rupees was increased to 999 (rather than 255), the overworld was altered, and dungeons were completely different. There is some allusion to this game being a "Third Quest", much like The Legend of Zelda's Second Quest.
